failure_modes.cause: Precipitation of reactants/products or particulate buildup in narrow 0.75mm ID tubing
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter upstream and pressure monitoring at coil exit

failure_modes.mode: Thermal runaway in long residence coil
failure_modes.cause: Exothermic side reactions or decomposition at 120°C with poor heat dissipation in 16m coil
failure_modes.mitigation: Segment coil with temperature monitoring every 4m and emergency cooling capability

failure_modes.mode: DES solvent degradation at high temperature
failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG deep eutectic solvent thermal decomposition at 120°C over 30 min residence time
failure_modes.mitigation: Monitor solvent color change and implement maximum operating time limits

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve failure causes pressure loss
validation_experiments: Run blank DES solvent at 120°C for 60 min; monitor pressure drop and collect samples for decomposition analysis
Inject 10 ppm silica particles; monitor pressure rise over 30 min to assess fouling tendency
Temperature mapping of 16m coil at steady state to identify hot spots
